title: Olympic Athletes from Russia women's national ice hockey team
summary: Olympic Athlete from Russia women's national ice hockey team (OAR) is the International Olympic Committee's designation of select Russian athletes permitted to participate in the 2018 Winter Olympics in Pyeongchang, South Korea. The designation is the result of the suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee after the Olympic doping controversy.
text:
Olympic Athlete from Russia women's national ice hockey team (OAR) is the International Olympic Committee's designation of select Russian athletes permitted to participate in the 2018 Winter Olympics in Pyeongchang, South Korea. The designation is the result of the suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee after the Olympic doping controversy.

Women's tournament

Russia women's national ice hockey team qualified by finishing 4th in the 2016 IIHF World Ranking.

Team roster
The following is the Olympic Athletes from Russia roster for the women's ice hockey tournament at the 2018 Winter Olympics.
Head coach:  Alexei Chistyakov     Assistant coach:  Alexander Vedernikov
